controls.title: Ensure cluster-admin is used only where required

findings.title: Binding grants cluster-admin to a ServiceAccount or group

remediation.summary: Bind a least-privilege Role instead of cluster-admin or a wildcard ClusterRole.
remediation.snippet: # bind a least-privilege Role, not cluster-admin or a wildcard ClusterRole

findings.title: Binding grants cluster-admin to a ServiceAccount or group

remediation.summary: Bind a least-privilege Role instead of cluster-admin or a wildcard ClusterRole.
remediation.snippet: # bind a least-privilege Role, not cluster-admin or a wildcard ClusterRole

controls.title: Minimize wildcard use in Roles and ClusterRoles

remediation.summary: Replace wildcard apiGroups/resources/verbs with the specific values required.
remediation.snippet: # replace wildcard rules with explicit apiGroups/resources/verbs

controls.title: Ensure default service accounts are not actively used
Ensure SA tokens are only mounted where necessary

remediation.summary: Set automountServiceAccountToken: false on the pod or ServiceAccount when the token is not needed.
Remove securityContext.privileged or set it to false; grant only the specific capabilities the workload needs.

controls.title: Minimize admission of containers wishing to share the host network

remediation.summary: Set hostNetwork: false; expose the workload via a Service instead.
Set hostPID: false.

controls.title: Minimize admission of containers with added capabilities

remediation.summary: Drop ALL capabilities and add back only those strictly required.

controls.title: Ensure all namespaces have network policies defined

remediation.summary: Apply a default-deny NetworkPolicy (empty podSelector, Ingress+Egress) and allow only required flows.

controls.title: Apply security context to pods and containers

remediation.summary: Set runAsNonRoot: true and a non-zero runAsUser in the security context.
Set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false in the container security context.
Set readOnlyRootFilesystem: true and mount writable paths as volumes.
Set seccompProfile.type: RuntimeDefault on the pod or container.

disclaimer: Indicative mapping to KubeGuard checks only; not a CIS certification or audit.

remediation.summary: Set hostNetwork: false; expose the workload via a Service instead.
Apply a default-deny NetworkPolicy (empty podSelector, Ingress+Egress) and allow only required flows.
Avoid direct LoadBalancer/NodePort exposure; front workloads with an ingress + WAF and restrict source ranges.
remediation.snippet:
spec:
  type: ClusterIP   # front with an ingress + WAF instead

remediation.summary: Remove securityContext.privileged or set it to false; grant only the specific capabilities the workload needs.
Remove the hostPath volume; use a projected/ephemeral volume or a CSI driver instead of mounting host paths or runtime sockets.
remediation.snippet: # remove the hostPath volume; use a CSI or projected volume instead

remediation.summary: Set runAsNonRoot: true and a non-zero runAsUser in the security context.
Set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false in the container security context.
Drop ALL capabilities and add back only those strictly required.
Set readOnlyRootFilesystem: true and mount writable paths as volumes.
Set seccompProfile.type: RuntimeDefault on the pod or container.

  type: ClusterIP   # front with an ingress + WAF instead
